generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how critical it is to strengthen our strategic autonomy. The recent cyber attacks on our infrastructure prove we can't rely solely on allies. While some worry about civil liberties, the real threat is doing nothing. We need robust domestic capabilities to deter aggression and protect our people. The alternative is playing catch-up when it's too late. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
